TheBusiness:
Acme Pest Control provides emergency pest control services to domestic and commercial customers across Reading, Berkshire and the surrounding area, specialising in the permanent eradication of bed bugs.

We pride ourselves on delivering exceptional customer service through a team of skilled technicians who are focused on solving pest problems quickly and properly. We’re so confident in our work that we guarantee both our response time and our results — so you can trust we’ll arrive when we say we will, and that the price we quote is the price you’ll pay.
